homepage.heroSubline: Powering homes and businesses with reliable electrical solutions. Certified Electric LLC: Quality work, guaranteed.
aboutText: Certified Electric LLC was founded over a decade ago with a simple mission: to provide top-quality electrical services to the Boise community. We saw a need for electricians who were not only skilled and knowledgeable, but also committed to honesty, integrity, and customer satisfaction. We've built our reputation on those principles.

Our approach is straightforward: we listen to our clients, assess their needs thoroughly, and deliver solutions that are both effective and affordable. We believe in clear communication, transparent pricing, and getting the job done right the first time. Every project, big or small, receives our full attention and dedication.

We're proud to be a part of the Boise community. We support local causes and strive to make a positive impact through our work. From wiring new homes in Harris Ranch to upgrading electrical systems in historic North End buildings, we're committed to powering Boise's future.

valueProps.title: Experienced Professionals
valueProps.description: Our team of licensed and insured electricians has years of experience in all aspects of electrical work.

valueProps.title: Reliable Service
valueProps.description: We arrive on time, complete projects efficiently, and stand behind our workmanship.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: You'll receive a clear, upfront estimate with no hidden fees or surprises.

valueProps.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
valueProps.description: We're available around the clock to handle any electrical emergency you may encounter.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact Certified Electric LLC today for a free estimate!

services.name: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Ensure your home's electrical system can handle modern demands.
services.description: Is your electrical panel outdated or insufficient for your current power needs? Homes in Boise's older neighborhoods like the North End often have panels that struggle to support modern appliances and electronics. An electrical panel upgrade from Certified Electric LLC can provide the necessary capacity and safety features to power your home reliably. We'll assess your current electrical load, recommend the appropriate panel size, and install it according to all local codes and regulations. This includes replacing old fuse boxes with modern circuit breaker panels. Don't risk overloading your system – protect your home and family with a panel upgrade.
process: Step 1: Comprehensive electrical load assessment
Step 2: Recommendation of appropriate panel size and type
Step 3: Safe removal and disposal of old panel
Step 4: Professional installation of new electrical panel
benefits: Support for modern appliances and electronics

faq.question: How do I know if I need an electrical panel upgrade?
faq.answer: Common signs include flickering lights, frequently tripped breakers, and the use of multiple extension cords. If you're planning to add new appliances or renovate your home, an upgrade may also be necessary.

faq.question: How long does an electrical panel upgrade take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the complexity of the job, but most panel upgrades can be completed in one day. We'll provide you with a more accurate estimate during our initial assessment.

faq.question: Is it safe to attempt an electrical panel upgrade myself?
faq.answer: No. Electrical work is inherently dangerous and should only be performed by a licensed and qualified electrician. Our team ensures safety and code compliance.

services.name: Lighting Installation
services.shortDescription: Enhance your home's ambiance and functionality with expert lighting solutions.
services.description: From recessed lighting in your kitchen to landscape lighting in your backyard, Certified Electric LLC offers a wide range of lighting installation services to brighten your Boise home. We can help you choose the right fixtures, install them safely and efficiently, and ensure they complement your home's style. We work with LED lighting, which is energy efficient and long-lasting, perfect for the dry Boise summers. Whether you're renovating your home or simply want to update your lighting, we've got you covered. Our professional team will handle all wiring and connections, guaranteeing a safe and reliable installation.
process: Step 1: Consultation to discuss your lighting needs and preferences
Step 2: Selection of appropriate lighting fixtures and components
Step 3: Professional wiring and installation of new lights
Step 4: Testing and verification of proper operation

faq.question: What types of lighting fixtures do you install?
faq.answer: We install a wide variety of fixtures, including recessed lighting, chandeliers, pendant lights, track lighting, landscape lighting, and more. We can also install smart lighting systems that can be controlled remotely.

faq.question: How much does lighting installation cost?
faq.answer: The cost depends on the type of fixtures, the complexity of the installation, and the amount of wiring required. We'll provide you with a free estimate after assessing your needs.

faq.question: Can you help me choose the right lighting for my home?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We can provide expert advice on lighting design and fixture selection to help you create the perfect ambiance for your home.

services.name: Outlet and Switch Repair
services.shortDescription: Address faulty outlets and switches for safety and convenience.
services.description: Faulty outlets and switches can be a nuisance and a safety hazard. If you're experiencing issues with your outlets or switches, such as sparking, buzzing, or not working at all, Certified Electric LLC can help. We'll diagnose the problem, repair or replace the faulty components, and ensure your electrical system is functioning safely and reliably. We're familiar with the wiring in older Boise homes, and can handle any repair, from replacing a broken outlet to upgrading your home to tamper-resistant outlets for child safety. Don't let a minor electrical issue turn into a major problem – call us today for prompt and professional service.
process: Step 1: Thorough inspection of outlets and switches
Step 2: Diagnosis of the underlying problem
Step 3: Repair or replacement of faulty components
Step 4: Testing and verification of proper operation

faq.question: Why are my outlets sparking?
faq.answer: Sparking outlets can be caused by loose wiring, damaged components, or overloaded circuits. It's important to address this issue promptly to prevent a fire hazard.

faq.question: How do I know if an outlet is overloaded?
faq.answer: Signs of an overloaded outlet include tripped breakers, warm outlets, and dimming lights when appliances are plugged in. Avoid using multiple high-powered appliances on the same circuit.

faq.question: What are tamper-resistant outlets?
faq.answer: Tamper-resistant outlets have a built-in safety mechanism that prevents children from inserting objects into the slots. They're a great way to protect your kids from electrical shock.

services.name: Whole-House Rewiring
services.shortDescription: Upgrade outdated wiring to ensure safety and meet modern power demands.
services.description: Older homes in Boise, particularly in areas like the East End, often have outdated wiring that can be a safety hazard. If your home's wiring is more than 25 years old, it may be time for a whole-house rewiring. Certified Electric LLC can replace your old wiring with modern, code-compliant wiring to ensure the safety and reliability of your electrical system. We understand the challenges of working in older homes and take extra care to minimize disruption during the rewiring process. We'll pull the necessary permits, handle all inspections, and ensure your home is up to code.
process: Step 1: Complete assessment of existing wiring
Step 2: Planning and design of new wiring layout
Step 3: Removal of old wiring
Step 4: Installation of new wiring and components

faq.question: How long does whole-house rewiring take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the size and complexity of your home, but most rewiring projects take 1-2 weeks. We'll provide you with a more accurate estimate during our initial assessment.

faq.question: Will I have to move out during the rewiring process?
faq.answer: While it's possible to live in your home during rewiring, it can be disruptive. We recommend discussing your options with our team to determine the best course of action.

faq.question: How much does whole-house rewiring cost?
faq.answer: The cost depends on the size of your home, the complexity of the wiring, and the materials used. We'll provide you with a free, detailed estimate before starting any work.

services.name: 24/7 Emergency Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Reliable support for any electrical emergency, day or night.
services.description: Electrical emergencies can happen at any time, and when they do, you need a reliable electrician you can count on. Certified Electric LLC offers 24/7 emergency electrical services to the Boise area. Whether it's a power outage, a downed power line, or a sparking electrical panel, we'll respond quickly and efficiently to resolve the issue and ensure your safety. Our team is equipped to handle any electrical emergency, and we'll work to minimize damage and restore power as quickly as possible. During Boise's hot summers and cold winters, a power outage can be especially dangerous, so don't hesitate to call us for immediate assistance.
process: Step 1: Immediate response to your emergency call
Step 2: Rapid diagnosis of the electrical problem
Step 3: Safe and efficient repair or replacement of faulty components
Step 4: Verification of proper operation and safety

faq.question: What constitutes an electrical emergency?
faq.answer: Any situation that poses an immediate threat to your safety or property, such as a power outage, sparking wires, or a downed power line, is considered an electrical emergency.

faq.question: How quickly will you respond to an emergency call?
faq.answer: We strive to respond to emergency calls as quickly as possible, typically within 30-60 minutes, depending on your location and the severity of the situation.

faq.question: What should I do while waiting for the electrician to arrive?
faq.answer: Stay away from any damaged electrical equipment or downed power lines. If possible, turn off the main power switch to your home. Wait for our team to arrive and assess the situation.

services.name: Electrical Inspections
services.shortDescription: Ensure your home's electrical system is safe and up to code.
services.description: Whether you're buying or selling a home in Boise, or simply want to ensure the safety of your family, an electrical inspection from Certified Electric LLC is a smart investment. Our certified electricians will thoroughly inspect your home's electrical system, identify any potential hazards or code violations, and provide you with a detailed report. We'll check everything from the wiring and outlets to the electrical panel and grounding system. With Boise's mix of new and older homes, electrical inspections are crucial for identifying potential problems before they become costly repairs. Don't wait until it's too late – schedule an electrical inspection today.
process: Step 1: Comprehensive visual inspection of all electrical components
Step 2: Testing of outlets, switches, and circuits
Step 3: Examination of the electrical panel and grounding system
Step 4: Detailed report outlining any findings and recommendations

faq.question: How often should I have an electrical inspection?
faq.answer: We recommend having an electrical inspection every 3-5 years, or whenever you're buying or selling a home.

faq.question: What happens if the inspection reveals problems?
faq.answer: We'll provide you with a detailed report outlining any issues and recommend the necessary repairs. We can also perform the repairs for you, ensuring your electrical system is safe and up to code.

faq.question: How long does an electrical inspection take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the size and complexity of your home, but most inspections take 2-4 hours.

services.name: Smart Home Installations
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your home with the latest smart technology for convenience and efficiency.
services.description: Transform your Boise home into a smart home with Certified Electric LLC. We specialize in installing and integrating smart home devices, including smart lighting, thermostats, security systems, and more. Control your home from your smartphone, automate tasks, and save energy with our expert smart home solutions. We'll handle all the wiring, programming, and integration to ensure your smart home system works seamlessly. As Boise embraces new technologies, smart home features are becoming increasingly popular, adding convenience and value to your property. Let us help you create a connected and intelligent home.
process: Step 1: Consultation to discuss your smart home goals and preferences
Step 2: Selection of appropriate smart home devices and components
Step 3: Professional wiring and installation of smart devices
Step 4: Programming and integration into a unified system

faq.question: What smart home devices can you install?
faq.answer: We install a wide range of smart home devices, including smart lighting, thermostats, security systems, doorbells, locks, and more. We can also integrate voice control systems like Amazon Alexa and Google Assistant.

faq.question: How much does smart home installation cost?
faq.answer: The cost depends on the devices you choose and the complexity of the installation. We'll provide you with a free estimate after assessing your needs.

faq.question: Do I need special wiring for smart home devices?
faq.answer: Some smart home devices require dedicated wiring, while others can operate wirelessly. We'll assess your home's wiring and recommend the appropriate solutions.

serviceAreas.content:
Certified Electric LLC is proud to provide top-notch electrical services to the residents and businesses of Boise, Idaho. As a locally owned and operated company, we understand the unique electrical needs of this vibrant community. Our team of licensed and experienced electricians is committed to delivering safe, reliable, and efficient solutions for all your electrical needs.

Whether you're dealing with a flickering light, require a complete home rewiring, or need assistance with commercial electrical installations, Certified Electric LLC is here to help. We prioritize customer satisfaction and strive to exceed your expectations with every project. Our services include electrical repairs, new construction wiring, panel upgrades, lighting installations, and much more. We are dedicated to keeping your home or business powered safely and effectively.

We're committed to serving Boise and the surrounding areas with integrity and professionalism. Contact us today for all your electrical needs!
serviceAreas.localContext: Boise is a thriving city known for its outdoor recreation, vibrant downtown, and strong sense of community. We understand the importance of reliable electrical systems to support the city's growing population and businesses.

reviews.name: Alice K.
reviews.text: Certified Electric upgraded my electrical panel in my older North End home. They were professional, efficient, and explained everything clearly. I had no idea my old panel was so outdated! Now I feel much safer and can finally run all my appliances without tripping breakers. Great service!

reviews.name: Bob M.
reviews.text: Had a couple of outlets that weren't working. Certified Electric came out quickly and fixed the problem. They were polite and professional. The price was reasonable, and I appreciate their prompt service.

reviews.name: Sarah L.
reviews.text: Certified Electric installed recessed lighting in my kitchen. They did an amazing job! The new lights completely transformed the space, and I couldn't be happier. The electricians were skilled and meticulous. I highly recommend them!

reviews.name: David P.
reviews.text: Had a power outage late at night, and Certified Electric was there within an hour. They quickly diagnosed the problem and restored power. I was so relieved! Their emergency service is a lifesaver.

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: Certified Electric rewired my entire home. It was a big job, but they handled it with professionalism and care. They kept me informed throughout the process and minimized disruption. The new wiring gives me peace of mind knowing my home is safe.

reviews.name: Tom S.
reviews.text: Certified Electric installed my smart thermostat and lighting system. The installation was smooth, and they showed me how to use everything. Now I can control my home's temperature and lighting from my phone. Very convenient!
